docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 79382852) TO PLAINTIFF CONCEPCION, JOSEPH TRUSTEE OF THE JOSEPH CONCEPCION TRUST DATED AUGUST 1, 2007

MASTER CALENDAR FEE WAIVER HEARING ON MAY-27-2026 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF JOSEPH CONCEPCION'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST, CLERK: V WU, NOT REPORTED (D206)

QUIET TITLE - REAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 79382852) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONCEPCION, JOSEPH TRUSTEE OF THE JOSEPH CONCEPCION TRUST DATED AUGUST 1, 2007 AS TO DEFENDANT GO, ELMER G. NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-14-2026 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-10-2026 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-21-2026
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF CONCEPCION, JOSEPH TRUSTEE OF THE JOSEPH CONCEPCION TRUST DATED AUGUST 1, 2007
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 79745425) FILED BY DEFENDANT GO, ELMER G.
PROOF OF SERVICE BY ELECTRONIC MAIL (TRANSACTION ID # 79745425) FILED BY DEFENDANT GO, ELMER G.
